reviews.comment:
Siempre una buena opción para relajarse a la ida o regreso de la costa. Aplican protocolo estrictamente. En la parrilla ofrecen muy buenos sandwiches, rapidos y sabrosos. El parque se recomienda.

(Translated by Google)
Always a good option to relax on the way to or from the coast. They strictly follow protocols. The grill offers very good sandwiches—quick and tasty. The park is recommended.
